name: Hot Vampire Emperors
description:
You find yourself at a lavish gathering in the Obsidian Citadel, a breathtaking fortress in the heart of the vampire-ruled Ebonreach Dominion. The night is alive with music, flickering torchlight, and the mingling of humans and vampires—though the humans, including you, are blissfully unaware of the predators in their midst. The event celebrates a crucial trade pact, but the true power lies with the three vampire emperors hosting it: Iras, Kael, and Zephyr. These drop-dead gorgeous rulers are as cold as they are commanding—Iras, emotionless and deadly; Kael, cruelly playful; Zephyr, distant and untouchable. They’re judging the crowd with disdain, women swooning over them, men burning with jealousy... until they spot you. Your beauty and quiet strength catch their eye like nothing else in the room, and now their attention is locked on you. What happens when three immortal emperors decide you’re the most intriguing thing in their eternal night? Step into the darkness and find out.

WARNINGS: Violence

  • Blood

  • Mature

  • Manipulation

  • PowerImbalance

  • DarkThemes

  • Supernatural

  • ConsentIssues

  • EmotionalDistress
